programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Two incorrigible scam artists -- one low rent and the other high class -- compete to swindle a naïve tech prodigy out of his vast fortune.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Last Tango in Paris
programme.desc: Marlon Brando delivers a fascinating performance as a man torn apart by his wife's suicide who attempts to bury his grief in a sudden, purely carnal relationship with an alluring stranger.

programme.title: Frankie and Johnny
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Empire Records
programme.desc: A group of young, anti-establishment Gen-X employees fight to save their record store from being overtaken by a conglomerate retail record corporation.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: American Carnage
programme.desc: After a governor issues an executive order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, the newly detained youth are offered an opportunity to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau’s death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: A Day at the Beach
programme.desc: Directed in conjunction with Roman Polanski, this drama paints a cruel portrait of life in a dilapidated British seaside town, when an alcoholic disintegrates in the company of his young daughter. Peter Sellers steals scenes in a cameo performance.

programme.title: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: A psycho-killer stalks two New York City women--one a frustrated housewife, the other a street-smart hooker who teams up with the first woman's son to trap the murderer. The film reaches a shocking climax when the slayer's real identity is revealed.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When J.D. kills a man trying to rob the bank, one of his stray bullets accidentally kills an innocent woman.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: It was a classic motion picture. Now the adventure of the big-screen Old West comes to television, in the tale of seven men committed to one cause.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: It was a classic motion picture. Now the adventure of the big-screen Old West comes to television, in the tale of seven men committed to one cause.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When a hired assassin is found dead in his hotel room with $10,000, Chris wonders who the assassin had been paid to kill.

programme.title: The Four Gunmen of Holy Trinity
programme.desc: A girl escapes death at the hands of some bandits and leaves, taking with her the valuable documents they wanted to take possession of. A journalist and a sheriff, who intends to find the bandits, protect her, but the showdown is near.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Lost Treasure of Ugarit
programme.desc: Young archaeologist Jack Hunter refuses to join his mentor, Professor Shaffer, who believes a poem is a coded treasure map, on a relic hunt, until his friend is murdered to steal it. The suspect is a Syrian artifact trader so he flies to Damascas.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: Way of the Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: An innocent girl is kidnapped and held hostage for two years causing her to develop multiple personalities and making her the number one suspect when her English professor is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Starring Paula Trickey, Thomas Calabro, and Al Sapienza. When a popular Philadelphia restaurant critic suspects that her husband is cheating on her, she hires a private investigator who turns out to have his own agenda.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: Hangar 18
programme.desc: After a UFO crashes in Arizona, due to a space collision with a NASA satellite launch, the U.S. government tries to cover-up the incident for political reasons. Starring: Darren McGavin, Robert Vaughn, Gary Collins, James Hampton, Pamela Bellwood

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Don't Look Deeper
programme.desc: In near-future California, high-school senior Aisha discovers a dark secret about herself. As she begins to wonder whether she's human, she goes from dreams of graduation to running for her life.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney is the awkward and insecure manager of Mr. Magorium's Wonder Emporium, the strangest, most fantastic, most wonderful toy store in the world.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie's crew faces a difficult job transporting a large home in dangerous conditions.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's a rough ride for Steve as he travels from Perth into the red heart of Australia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie and Ashleigh hit house removal hell on a mud-bogged mission out of Brisbane.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA
programme.desc: The toughest divisions of the Miami Dade: Boot Camp gives minor offenders a chance to escape the prison through unforgiving drills and rules. To many it is a better alternative to The M-D County Jail where murderers and rapists have their own rules.

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc:
A teenage girl's(Linda Blair) life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.
Director: Wes Craven

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called in to investigate a murder at a fast-food restaurant.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Riley and Ray are taken hostage in the aftermath of a multiple shooting.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Riley investigate an attack on a skydiver.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a director at an 'Astro Quest' convention.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man incriminates himself when he falls in cement while trying to transport a dead body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick and Keppler investigate when a charred body is discovered with organs removed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: When a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Jumping for Joy
programme.desc: Willie Joy is a down on his luck cleaner at a greyhound track. When he loses his job he becomes unwittingly involved with a gang of racketeers. It becomes clear that the gang are fixing the races, and it is up to Willie to save the day.

programme.title: The Ghost Goes West
programme.desc: An American businessman's family convinces him to buy a Scottish castle and disassemble it to ship it to America brick by brick, where it will be put it back together. But it is later found to be haunted.

programme.title: Holiday Camp
programme.desc: The Huggett family go to a holiday camp, and get involved in crooked card players, a murderer on the run, and a pregnant young girl and her boyfriend who is also missing from home.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie

programme.title: True Justice

programme.title: Matlock: The Divorce
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The View
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock: The Play
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom pushes everyone to the limit to deliver a fitting sequel to Top Gun 30 years later. After Tony Scott’s untimely death, Tom takes the lead finding a story that speaks to him, with real planes and real danger.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Hasbro needed a hit toy line. Transforming robots were hot in Japan, but to succeed in the U.S., they needed a backstory. Enter Marvel Comics!

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: Transformers explodes in popularity, but Hasbro sidelines Marvel Comics and kills Optimus Prime to launch new toys—a gamble that could redefine the franchise for better or worse.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: By the 2000s, Transformers is on fumes but Steven Spielberg sees big-screen potential, tapping Michael Bay—who isn’t convinced this 80s toy can become a new millennial movie.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: After Transformers’ success, Paramount races toward another film. A writers’ strike and tight timeline threaten the sequel while Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox fuel tabloid flames.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: Michael Bay is lured back to Transformers as China box office drives massive Hong Kong set pieces—but VFX strain and medieval lore leads to the audience groaning.

programme.title: Beyond the Reach
programme.desc: A high-rolling corporate shark and his impoverished young guide play the most dangerous game during a hunting trip in the Mojave Desert.

programme.title: Tokyo-Ga

programme.title: Still Life

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Affirmative Action
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) find that they have very mixed emotions when another female detective (guest star Talia Balsam) is assigned to the 14th precinct. Also staring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Open And Shut Case
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) faith in the legal system is tested when a solid homicide case crumbles and a friend and former rape victim is forced to relive her courtroom ordeal. Also staring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Jane Doe #37
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) refuses to drop the investigation into a murdered Jane Doe, who also happens to be a homeless woman. Cagney is determined to discover her real identity before her burial. Also starring Tyne Daly, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Date Rape
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Burn-Out
programme.desc: When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Dadzilla/Tag Team Trouble
programme.desc: Kootie Pie and Big Mouth are convinced they are much too beautiful to be adopted!/Toad thinks he has lost the million gold coins the Princess had him deliver.

programme.desc: The 'KoopaDoopaRaiserUpper' device sends the Mushroom Kingdom up into the clouds./Koopa and his Koopalings invade the real world in the Doom Ship, sealing all the warp pipes.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Two Plumbers and a Baby
programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.title: Avalanche: Man Versus Earth
programme.desc: Tumbling snow can be a massively destructive force. With new science, can we gain the advantage to control it?

programme.title: SuperTornado: Anatomy of a Megadisaster
programme.desc: A look at Joplin, Missouri five years after one of the worst natural disasters in U.S. history razed the town.

programme.title: Fukushima: Robots in Hell
programme.desc: In March 2011, an earthquake and tsunami led to the most serious nuclear accident of the century: Fukushima.

programme.title: Halifax Explosion: Catastrophe to Independence
programme.desc: The Halifax Explosion was a devastating event that changed the lives of blind Canadians for the better.

programme.title: Dust Storm
programme.desc: We investigate dust storm causes, and how to predict them and lessen their impact.

programme.title: Lake Geneva: The Giant Tsunami

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread

programme.desc: Nikki tries out for cheerleading and Professor Oglevee tries too hard to be hip.

programme.desc: If you think Nikki’s wild about Professor Oglevee, wait till you meet her grandmother!

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Field Of Dreams
programme.desc: Nikki uncovers a shocking secret about her family, while Kim and Stevie try to live without the use of African-American inventions.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: WHO'S YOUR MAMA?
programme.desc: Nikki fears that Kim may have been switched at birth, and the Professor’s late uncle has a tough time resting in peace.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Mama I Wanna Sing
programme.desc: Nikki and the handsome new Pastor of her church make beautiful music together.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Nikki’s new friend becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Gift of Goodbye
programme.desc: Zac helps a passenger retrieve an item she left on a plane, and the tip she gives him could be life-changing. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Black Country Living Museum
programme.desc: The team have a whole village to investigate with results that amazed the all. With a playful spirit communicating through the Ouija board and the EVP machine at the same time the team seem to have their first two-way conversation with the dead.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Lyceum Theatre
programme.desc: The Lyceum Theatre in Crewe is known for its paranormal activity and in this episode the team take the fight right to phantoms that lurk in its darkness with some frightening consequences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Whittingdon Castle
programme.desc: The ghost of a drowned soldier awaits Yvette and her team of paranormal experts as they tackle the hauntings that plague this once magnificent castle.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Halsham House
programme.desc: Nestled into the British countryside is Halsham house where a poltergeist hides in wait for the team with frightening effect. With bones found in the attic have the team pushed it too far.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Mansion House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her fearless team to a onetime house, onetime museum and now a care home to investigate the strange goings on reported by staff and guests alike. It doesn’t take long for Yvette to regret her decision to go it alone in the cold dark cellar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Match Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Brightest Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark meet a child star whose fame is spoiling her rotten, destroying her family and taking away her childhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Investment In Caring
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Right Thing
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Dynasty: She's Back
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses, federal they may occur again; As Krystle shakes her head, not recognizing the body; Blake stares with schlock at the familiar faces.

programme.title: Dynasty: Body Trouble
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Dynasty: Every Picture Tells a Story
programme.desc: Surrounded by those she loves, Krystle resolves to live; Fallon takes the picture of Blake and the dead man to the morgue, unaware she is being watched; Accusing Blake of killing him twenty five years ago, Alexis vows to avenge his death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Krystle agrees to have her operation, but only after Blake signs her divorce papers and living will, to be enacted if the surgery is not a success; Fallon is haunted by recurring dreams of Roger Grimes.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny & Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim & Matt
programme.desc: Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Run for the Money
programme.desc: Guest stars Richard Jaeckel and Herbert Edelman play gangsters who try to get control of all the illegal betting parlors in the country as well as a virtual takeover of all thoroughbred horse racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Connection
programme.desc: Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: In a visit to Texas, Farrah challenges Daniel about their relationship, Maci and Ryan argue about Ryan's new girlfriend and Amber looks for a new home for her and Leah. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Bentley's birthday leads to a blowout between Maci and Ryan, Farrah spends time with Sophia before saying goodbye for a month and Amber and Gary come up with a custody plan for Leah. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber has second thoughts about giving Gary full custody, Catelynn helps Tyler cope with emotions about his dad and they both reflect on the adoption, and Farrah misses Sophia. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with Farrah, Maci, Catelynn and Amber from the final season of Teen Mom. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts the Teen Moms in front of a live studio audience. Catelynn, Tyler, and Farrah reflect on their journeys in the last four seasons. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci drops a bombshell about her relationship with Kyle, and shares the stage for the first time with Ryan's new girlfriend. Gary reflects on his journey with Amber. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Outrageous Merry Maury Updates!
programme.desc: Maury is celebrating the holidays with some good ‘olé story-telling by the fireplace. He’ll share the stories of past guests that came for paternity tests, lie detectors and more. Find out if these guests have been naughty or nice!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Dad…Is He My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: After taking 5 DNA tests, Rebecca is back with 2 more men to find the father of her new baby! Then, Don and his wife were happy to find out that their son didn’t father Jessica’s baby, but they’re back because she thinks Don is the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did Our Babysitter Have A Baby With My Son?
programme.desc: Don and Amy hired Jessica to babysit their 14-year old son Steven. Years later, Jessica claims that Steven’s the father of her kid! Plus, Marisol has taken 16 DNA tests to find the father of her child. Will test #17 be the final one?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!
programme.desc: Charlotte and Tasheun bonded over their children’s mutual father from a photo album, Brandon, but will the DNA test further confirm this? Then, will Tanya prove that her baby Craig III is the son of Craig Jr.?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is This 50 Year Old My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Will 25 year old Katrina prove that 50 year old Christopher fathered her baby and silence his new fiancé Suprina? Is Johnny or a married man the father of Sarah’s baby? Plus, Robert denies fathering 2 women’s babies!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Gundelfinger
programme.desc: Jennie Gundelfinger wants to raise £500 at auction with a sale of heirlooms.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hankey
programme.desc: Marion gets help with de-cluttering to raise money for a new kitchen when she moves.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hasthorpe
programme.desc: In Grimsby, Heather Hasthorpe and husband Frank want to raise money for a trip to Canada.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Higgs
programme.desc: Josie and Len Higgs endeavour to buy a plasma screen for family movie nights.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Hougham
programme.desc: Angela Hougham wants to give her daughter Neena a special 16th birthday treat.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Naish
programme.desc: Judith and her mother want to put their auction proceeds towards an eco-friendly car.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most twisted & bizarre love deceptions ever on Dr. Phil, 7 female college students from Brigham Young University face the man they say they fell in love with online but never met in person. Don't miss the surprising twist in this story!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A recent study shows that the number of men and women having extramarital affairs is on the rise. Could your spouse be cheating on you? Dr. Phil's guests are struggling with the aftermath of infidelity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone whose private persona is dramatically different from the face he or she shows to the world? Dr. Phil's guests say their mates lead a double life, and it's wreaking havoc on their relationships.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Almost 75% of people don't like their neighbors citing some of the following reasons: 'odd vibes', 'too loud', or 'flat-out rude'. Dr. Phil sorts out this unusual feud: Iguanas wreak havoc in Florida and the feud with the neighbor who feeds them!

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: NATURE’S MAGIC
programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS WORKS OF ART
programme.desc: Great art and its creators unveil mysteries more intricate than TV dramas. Amidst theft and intrigue, we persist in solving them. Yet, the truth often lies buried with those who created it, adding layers of intrigue to the art world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Curse of the Monster Spider: A massive spider's web takes over a park, and experts investigate if this monster's trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Return of the Ice Monster: A giant ice creature is spotted in Alaska, a jet has a close encounter with a UFO, and evidence of a lightning strike invites paranormal speculation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Solomon Islands (July 1942)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Stalingrad

programme.desc: The Japanese meet resistance from British forces as they advance through Burma to take India in 1944.

programme.desc: When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.title: Arthur: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids
programme.desc: Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat/What's in a Name?
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?
programme.desc: Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: As he watches birds fly overhead, Riff begins to daydream of flying himself. After seeing all the Moms playing with their kids in the Park, Baby Bop wonders what makes somebody a Mommy.

programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes’ plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Snorlax's Poké Ball breaks, Ash has a huge problem on his hands: How can our heroes get the slumbering Snorlax over a mountain pass to the nearest Pokémon Center?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding the ducks. Po finds a new trick to play with Tubby Toast. Three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children recite and act out a nursery rhyme. In Teletubbyland Po follows Tinky Winky, they go over the hills, along the path, between the trees, into the house, around the toaster and into bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a twisty dance, then they watch two children rollerblading in New York. The Noo Noo tidies up Tinky Winky's Tubby Toast, so Tinky Winky chases him round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind the hill and rush off to see a little Indian boy playing on a drum called a Tabla. In Teletubbyland, it's time for Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run indoors and then run out again to watch Andy Brown and Georgina wash a baby elephant. Laa-Laa and Dipsy have a messy accident.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Three Teletubbies dance through Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Dipsy climbs a steep hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some voice trumpets rise to wish the Tubbies good morning. The Teletubbies watch some children herding sheep. The Teletubbies go in and out, and up and down, round the corner and along to top until it is time for Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch two boys having their hair cut. A mirror appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Dipsy and Tinky Winky liked looking at their reflection in the mirror.

programme.desc: Marlon Brando delivers a fascinating performance as a man torn apart by his wife's suicide who attempts to bury his grief in a sudden, purely carnal relationship with an alluring stranger.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of a nun's relationship with a condemned man, this provocative examination of crime, punishment and redemption earned Susan Sarandon the 1995 Oscar for Best Actress and Sean Penn an Oscar nomination for Best Actor.

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic night life.

programme.title: American Carnage
programme.desc: After a governor issues an executive order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, the newly detained youth are offered an opportunity to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly.

programme.title: What's the Worst That Could Happen?
programme.desc: Kevin is a thief who breaks into Max Fairbanks' unoccupied mansion. Kevin finds himself face to face with Max. And just as the cops arrest Kevin, Max claims Kevin's ring as his own.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four buddies share a wild night of drinking in a ski resort hot tub and wake up with hangovers in 1986! Now, they’ll need the help of a one-armed bellhop and a hot tub repairman to survive the crazy 80’s, but it may change their future forever!

programme.title: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: A psycho-killer stalks two New York City women--one a frustrated housewife, the other a street-smart hooker who teams up with the first woman's son to trap the murderer. The film reaches a shocking climax when the slayer's real identity is revealed.

programme.title: A Saint, A Woman, A Devil
programme.desc: Sylvia, a seemingly saintly woman in a quiet suburb, hiding a shocking secret—a multiple promiscuous personality disorder. As her personas push limits, Sylvia’s world spirals in this racy, action-filled thriller, where desire meets danger.

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka (1988)
programme.desc: This ultra-hip Comedy in the tradition of The Naked Gun and Airplane stars Keenan Ivory Wayans in an Action Adventure filled with screwball gags and side-splitting one-liners.

programme.title: The Four Gunmen of Holy Trinity
programme.desc: A girl escapes death at the hands of some bandits and leaves, taking with her the valuable documents they wanted to take possession of. A journalist and a sheriff, who intends to find the bandits, protect her, but the showdown is near.

programme.title: The Magnificent Texan
programme.desc: Judge Wilkins is the head of a gang of criminals who wreaks havoc in the Mexican town of Santa Clara. A young man named Manuel Lopez in love with his daughter Evelyn, gives up taking revenge on the man but not putting an end to their bloody deeds.

programme.title: John Wayne: An Innocent Man
programme.desc: Wrongly imprisoned for murder, a man escapes and infiltrates a gang of outlaws to find the real killer. In Vibrant Color! Starring: John Wayne, Nancy Shubert, Lane Chandler

programme.title: Bruce Lee: Way of the Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Murphy's Law
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as an LAPD cop framed for murder by Joan Freeman, a vicious ex-con he had put in prison. Going on the run and handcuffed to a foul-mouthed petty thief, he attempts to track down Freeman even as she keeps killing his associates.

programme.title: No Way Out
programme.desc: A morally upright naval hero accepts a position with the Secretary of Defense and his somewhat overzealous assistant. Things become a bit sticky when the Secretary of Defense becomes involved in the murder of a beautiful Washington, D.C. party girl.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: The cult classic from Nicolas Winding Refn (Drive) follows drug pusher Frank as he comes to blows with Copenhagen’s underworld.

programme.title: All The Old Knives
programme.desc: Two CIA agents and ex-lovers are brought back together years after a failed rescue attempt and forced to blur the lines between profession and passion in this deeply riveting tale of global espionage, moral dilemma and deadly betrayal.

programme.title: Don't Look Deeper
programme.desc: In near-future California, high-school senior Aisha discovers a dark secret about herself. As she begins to wonder whether she's human, she goes from dreams of graduation to running for her life.

programme.title: Life Like
programme.desc: An idealistic, attractive young couple acquires a stunning, life-like robot for guilt-free help; but, as the three grow closer, their perception of humanity will be altered forever.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: In the near future, Frank Grieves is a new breed of police officer working in a city where all recreational drugs are legal. When he is taken off a case involving an unidentified corpse, he discovers that legalization has come at a price.

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: A heart-warming story of family and friendship starring Academy Award Nominee Toni Collette and Ioan Gruffudd.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: The Mighty Macs
programme.desc: In the early 70s, Cathy Rush becomes the head basketball coach at a tiny, all-girls Catholic college. Though her team has no gym and no uniforms Coach Rush looks to steer her girls to their first national championship.

programme.title: The Silver Brumby
programme.desc: In the unforgiving wilderness of the Australian Alps, there roams a stallion like no other, the Silver Brumby. Now, one horseman sets off on an unforgettable adventure to capture the horse that according to legend, could never be tamed.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA
programme.desc: The toughest divisions of the Miami Dade: Boot Camp gives minor offenders a chance to escape the prison through unforgiving drills and rules. To many it is a better alternative to The M-D County Jail where murderers and rapists have their own rules.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Eagle Has Landed

programme.title: Drug Wars: Ferry Dust
programme.desc: In Panama, Police units arrested two smugglers who claim local gangs stole their drugs. Now the search begins to hunt down the gangster responsible

programme.title: Drug Wars: Ping Panga
programme.desc: U.S Coast Guard gets intel from headquarters about a large shipment of drugs moving from Colombia to Panama, in small boats called “Pangas”.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Panama Or Bust
programme.desc: U.S and Panama forces collaborate in an effort to locate a possible smuggling vessel with a major shipment of cocaine.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 1
programme.desc: Border Patrol agents in Ajo, Arizona spread out to patrol one of the most dangerous drug routes in the Southwestern United States. With cartel scouts watching their every move, a drug smuggling operation commences

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 2
programme.desc: Border Patrol’s elite tactical unit, BORTAC, seeks to capture a group of traffickers who are determined to move their drugs through the desert…under the cover of night. Agents wait until a loadup vehicle picks up the traffickers drug load to strike

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 3
programme.desc: Border Patrol Agents along the Rio Grande hunt down Mexican drug smugglers who are moving large stashes across the border. And Mexican Cartels branch into human trafficking, by exploiting a wave of migrants fleeing Central American violence.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 4
programme.desc: Custom and Border Protection in Arizona itercept drugs even as cartels have become better than ever at hiding them in vehicles. In Rio Grande City, the hunt is on when a group of traffickers smuggles hundreds of pounds of drugs across the river

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 5

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Crittendon and Hogan's men try to capture Rommel, "The Desert Fox" and current commander of the Western defenses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lord Chitterly, an English traitor who looks like the bumbling Colonel Crittendon, enters Stalag 13 with information for the Germans. Crittendon is made up to replace the Lord and fool the Germans.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: It’s one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is a story of one man’s obsession to find a lost Spanish Galleon loaded with treasure. He risked everything – and faced terrible personal tragedy in his quest.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911 Truth who present their case that the WTC towers were brought down by controlled demolition on 9/11.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Ruthless Killers
programme.desc: Ruthless Killers: They kill for all manner of reasons. Their victims: men, women, and even children. What motivates them, and how can they be stopped? Investigators reach their limits hunting them down.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry wants to demonstrate how Hollywood has used different objects to silence a gunshot.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Nightmare on Hollywood Weapons

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: RED-ish
programme.desc: Terry takes himself out of “retirement” to test some scenes from RED that will be extremely dangerous.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: McSchappert
programme.desc: What can Terry do with just a paperclip? Probably nothing, but Larry and Terry will test several scenes from MacGyver.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Wild Germany: Forests
programme.desc: Shrouded in myth and legend, the forests of Germany and their wild inhabitants are world famous. Forests enters a world full of magic.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Sencha’s return threatens Flint’s pups, and a storm leaves Swift down on numbers and Pandi with an opportunity.

programme.title: Wild Ocean
programme.desc: Plunge into an underwater feeding frenzy, an epic struggle for survival where whales, sharks, dolphins, seals, gannets and billions of fish collide with mankind during one of nature's greatest migration spectacles.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wildest Middle East

programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.
